hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.notebook_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$file_path" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$file_path" | grep -qE "\.syde/|\.claude/|node_modules/|vendor/|web/dist/|web/node_modules/|\.git/|^/tmp/"; then exit 0; fi; if [ ! -d .syde ]; then exit 0; fi; approved=$(syde plan list 2>/dev/null | grep -cE "approved|in-progress" || true); if [ "$approved" = "0" ]; then echo "syde BLOCK: no approved plan. Run syde plan create <name>, present it, wait for explicit chat approval, then syde plan approve <slug>. The skill is strict about this — design before code." >&2; exit 2; fi; active=$(syde task list 2>/dev/null | grep -c "●" || true); if [ "$active" = "0" ]; then echo "syde BLOCK: no active task. Start one with syde task start <slug> before writing code. Tasks track scope, files affected, and drift — writing without one breaks the audit trail." >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'input=$(cat); file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$file_path" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$file_path" | grep -qE "\.syde/|\.claude/|node_modules/|vendor/|web/dist/|web/node_modules/|\.git/|^/tmp/"; then exit 0; fi; if [ ! -d .syde ]; then exit 0; fi; mapped=$(syde constraints check "$file_path" --json 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$mapped" ] || [ "$mapped" = "{}" ]; then echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"syde: file $file_path is not mapped to any entity. Run syde update <component> --file \\\"$file_path\\\" to attach it, or it will orphan at sync check time.\"}"; fi'

bash -c 'if [ ! -d .syde ]; then exit 0; fi; input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "git\s+commit|git\s+push"; then msgs=""; tasks=$(syde task list 2>/dev/null | grep -c "●\|○" || true); if [ "$tasks" -gt 0 ]; then msgs="$msgs $tasks tasks still pending/in_progress. Run syde task done for each."; fi; if ! syde sync check --strict >/dev/null 2>&1; then msgs="$msgs syde sync check --strict failed. Fix every error and warning (orphans, drift, stale tree, missing fields) before committing."; fi; if [ -n "$msgs" ]; then echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"syde WARNING:$msgs\"}"; fi; fi'

bash -c 'if [ -d .syde ]; then ctx=$(syde context --json 2>/dev/null); tree_status=""; if ! syde tree status --strict >/dev/null 2>&1; then tree_status=" TREE SUMMARY IS STALE — run syde tree scan then iterate syde tree changes --leaves-only + syde tree summarize to clean it before planning."; fi; if [ -n "$ctx" ]; then echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"syde architecture context: $ctx$tree_status\"}"; fi; fi'

bash -c 'if [ ! -d .syde ]; then exit 0; fi; syde tree scan >/dev/null 2>&1; if ! syde sync check --strict >/dev/null 2>&1; then highlights=$(syde sync check 2>&1 | grep -E "ERROR|WARN|Gaps:" | head -5 | tr "\n" " " | sed "s/\"/ /g"); echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"syde FINISH GATE: syde sync check --strict failed. Fix every error and warning before ending the session (orphan files, drift, stale summary tree, missing fields, broken rels). Run: syde sync check. Highlights: $highlights\"}"; fi'
